description: As-is 3-bed, 1.5-bath two-story in Dexter-Fenkell, minutes from University of Detroit Mercy. The structure money is already spent — roof is about two years old and the electrical panel is new — so the ~$45k scope is straight cosmetics: kitchen, bath, ceilings/drywall, paint, refinish the hardwoods, furnace. All-in lands near $80k against a $125k ARV backed by three renovated sales within 0.3 miles, topped by the $140k Parkside flip 700 feet up the street. Clear title on a warranty deed, seller pays all back water, taxes ($2,448/yr), and blight at close — projected net around $32,500 after selling and holding costs.
highlights: Roof ~2 yrs old + new electrical panel — structure money spent
Clear title — seller pays all back charges at close

comps.note: Sold 05/2026 — 3/1.5, 1,204 sqft, $116/sqft, same frame build, 700 ft away
